docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ENNIS, LAMAR HAROLD HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2016 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 514

NAME CHANGE CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2016, NAME CHANGE CALENDAR - GRANTED PER WRITTEN DECREE. HEARING NOT REQUIRED. PROOF OF PUBLICATION NOT REQUIRED. IT APPEARS TO THE SATISFACTION OF THE COURT THAT ALL THE CONTENTIONS IN THE PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME ARE TRUE AND CORRECT, AND THAT THE PETITION SHOULD BE GRANTED. THE COURT GRANTS PETITIONER'S REQUEST TO CHANGE HIS NAME FROM LAMAR HAROLD ENNIS TO HAROLD-LAMAR SNIPE-MCMILLAN, JR. DECREE CHANGING NAME IS SUBMITTED TO AND SIGNED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: MEREDITH GRIER. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (D514).
PETITION FOR CHANGE OF NAME, RESIDENCY VERIFIED, FILED BY PETITIONER ENNIS, LAMAR HAROLD JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PETITIONER ENNIS, LAMAR HAROLD ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECREE CHANGING NAME FILED BY PETITIONER ENNIS, LAMAR HAROLD
COPYING FEES (3 PAGE, 3 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PETITIONER ENNIS, LAMAR HAROLD
